defaultPolicy: Most local services are optional. Start only the service tied to the capability you are testing, then verify its health before blaming provider or agent code.

services.name: ChromaDB
services.failureSymptom: Semantic memory seed or verification scripts fail with connection refused, unavailable Chroma endpoint, or missing v2 tenant/database API errors.
services.handoffNote: Mention whether CHROMA_URL is set, whether the v2 heartbeat responded, and whether the work uses semantic-memory scripts rather than file-backed MCP memory.

services.name: Grafana
services.startCommand: GRAFANA_USER=admin GRAFANA_PASSWORD=<unique-password> docker compose up -d grafana
services.failureSymptom: Dashboard links or Grafana panels are unavailable even though application tests and traces still run.
services.handoffNote: Record that Grafana credentials were set to a non-default password before starting compose.

services.name: Tempo
services.failureSymptom: Trace export or Grafana trace panels cannot reach Tempo, while local SQLite traces may still be present.
services.handoffNote: Check both Tempo readiness on 3200 and OTLP/HTTP target 4318 when debugging trace export.

services.name: AI provider CLI or API credentials
services.startCommand: Install and authenticate at least one configured provider CLI, or export the API key for an API-backed provider.
services.healthCheck: command -v claude || command -v codex || command -v gemini || test -n "${ANTHROPIC_API_KEY:-}${OPENAI_API_KEY:-}${GOOGLE_API_KEY:-}${GEMINI_API_KEY:-}"
services.failureSymptom: Provider resolution fails, local chat cannot produce a turn, or Beast runs stop before model invocation.
services.handoffNote: Name the selected provider path and whether it is CLI-authenticated or API-key backed.

services.name: Secret backend
services.healthCheck: test -f .fbeast/config.json && (test -f .fbeast/secrets.enc || test -n "${BW_SESSION:-}" || op account get >/dev/null 2>&1 || security find-generic-password -s frankenbeast >/dev/null 2>&1)
services.failureSymptom: Runtime config contains secret refs but commands cannot resolve operator tokens or provider credentials.
services.handoffNote: Record the configured network.secureBackend and the backend-specific proof: local encrypted vault plus FRANKENBEAST_PASSPHRASE, BW_SESSION, op CLI session, or OS keychain availability.

edgeCases.expectedAction: Use npm run bootstrap -- --no-docker and skip ChromaDB, Grafana, and Tempo unless the issue explicitly touches those services.
Do not start optional compose services as a default fix; root documentation and unit tests should explain service requirements without depending on live services.

edgeCases.case: A URL env var points to a remote service
edgeCases.expectedAction: Treat the service as externally managed; verify the URL and credentials rather than starting the local compose service on the same port.
